title: Workers Education Program. The Department shall disseminate
content: 14 information on labor and employment conditions and migration realities as well as 15 reintegration preparations to adequately prepare individuals, and empower them to make 16 informed and intelligent decisions about overseas employment. 17 18 Toward this end, the Department shall resort to modes of information and dissemination 19 campaigns, such as the conduct of PEOS, PDOS, and PAOS. Completion of the PEOS 20 online and PDOS shall be mandatory for all applicants for overseas employment. 21 The Department shall likewise conduct a nationwide, multi-media campaign to 22 continuously disseminate anti-illegal recruitment and trafficking in persons laws and 23 regulations, updated lists of licensed agencies and entities and other essential information 24 through information and education materials in various media. 25 26
